body.text: Drag-and-drop the four documents below into this chat (or use the paperclip icon). I'll confirm each one as it arrives.

facts.title: 1. Journal Report
facts.value: Full GL / detail report for the period

facts.title: 2. Balance Sheet
facts.value: As of period-end, with prior-period comparative

facts.title: 3. Profit & Loss
facts.value: For the period, with prior-period comparative

facts.title: 4. Bank Statements
facts.value: All bank + credit card accounts, full period

body.text: Accepted formats: PDF, XLSX, CSV. Mark scanned (image-only) statements when you upload — OCR is slower and less accurate.
